summary: Lead accepts M4 automatic field engagement resolution and minimal siege choice loop after systems_architect R2 ACCEPT and lead integration gates. The task adds shared GameCommand paths, deterministic engagement/siege state and events, save/load event-tail parser support for new M4 combat events, siege read models, player/AI parity coverage, and focused regressions while preserving hard exclusions for manual node battle, tactical/3D UI, complex naval battle, full diplomacy, peace treaties, multiplayer/server, client UI, and save-format changes.

tests_run.result: Passed architecture boundaries, determinism, root Vitest 31 files / 212 tests, and web tests 1 file / 3 tests.

decisions: Accepted only after R2 added event-tail load parser support for both new M4 combat events and siege player/AI parity coverage.
Kept save-format package untouched; this task covers sim-core event-tail compatibility only.
No manual node battle or peace/diplomacy scope was introduced.
risks: M4 world snapshot schema migration remains outside this task; event-tail compatibility evidence is sufficient for this slice.
Future combat balance/AI policy tuning remains for later M4 tasks.
requested_action: Create PR, require CI, merge to main, close task only after integration, then continue to next READY M4 task.
